start.text: Uncle Lim is back. He looks tired and groggy but overall well.
start.speaker: empty

its_me.text: It's me, Uncle. I'm just going to check on you, okay? Don't try to get up.
its_me.speaker: player

post_op_checks.text: You run through your post-op checks quietly, vitals, wound site, drain output, pain score. He winces slightly when you ask him to rate his pain. He holds up three fingers, then wavers and adds a fourth.
post_op_checks.speaker: empty

pain_meds.text: Okay, I hear you. I'll let the team know, we'll get you something for the pain soon. You're doing really well, Uncle.
pain_meds.speaker: player

its_done.text: It's done. Surgery went well. You did great.
its_done.speaker: player

quiet_moment.text: He's quiet for a long moment. You watch his face process it, the weight of thirty-seven months setting itself down somewhere outside his body at last.
quiet_moment.speaker: empty

head_up_whole_way.text: You did, Uncle. Head up the whole way.
head_up_whole_way.speaker: player

ghost_of_smile.text: His eyes drift closed again, but the corners of his mouth turn up, just barely, the ghost of a smile under the oxygen mask.
ghost_of_smile.speaker: empty

stay_a_moment.text: You stay a moment longer than you need to. Just to make sure he's settled. That's what you tell yourself.
stay_a_moment.speaker: empty
